name: American Express® Green Card
effective_cost: Low if you use CLEAR and travel/transit spend

verdict.text: Low-commitment MR earner if you use transit + the CLEAR credit

earn_rates.category: Travel — flights, hotels, cruises, car rentals, vacation rentals
Transit — trains, rideshare, tolls, parking, buses, subways

earn_note: The broadest 3× categories of any no-fee-adjacent Amex — travel, transit, and dining all qualify, which covers most day-to-day spend for someone who commutes or travels regularly.

points.note: Same Membership Rewards currency and transfer partner chart as the Platinum and Gold — cashing out at 0.6¢ throws away most of the value.

transfer_partners.highlight: Full access to the same Membership Rewards transfer chart as the Platinum and Gold — 17 airline and 3 hotel partners.
transfer_partners.recent_changes: Subject to the same program-wide changes as any other Membership Rewards card.

credits.name: CLEAR Plus
credits.subtitle: airport security
credits.description: Covers a CLEAR+ membership at 55+ airports nationwide.
tips: $0 to you if you don't fly through CLEAR airports.

insurance.detail: Secondary, decline the counter CDW to activate

protection_note: Standard-tier Amex protection across the board — purchase protection caps at $1,000/item (not the $10,000 premium-card tier), and the 12-hour trip delay trigger is one of the weaker windows in this dashboard.
rental_note: Secondary coverage only — put rentals on a card with primary coverage if you rent often.

services.name: Global Assist Hotline
services.detail: 24/7 emergency coordination when traveling 100+ miles from home (cardholder pays for any services rendered).

services.name: No Preset Spending Limit
services.detail: Purchase power adjusts based on your spending patterns rather than a fixed credit line.

services.name: No foreign transaction fees
services.detail: Zero FX fees on international spend.

additional_cards.title: Additional cards

benefits.text: Free to add — no authorized user fee
Earns Membership Rewards on their spend (into your account)
Does not get their own CLEAR credit

additional_cards.note: Additional cards are free with no authorized user fee, unlike the Platinum's paid add-on cards.
